title: levieria scandens
intro: Leveria scandens, also known as the Climbing Leveria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Leveria scandens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Leveria scandens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
